```text
1	//! ratatui draw layer. Stateless — reads `AppState` and draws.
2	
3	use chess_core::board::BoardShape;
4	use chess_core::coord::Square;
5	use chess_core::piece::{PieceKind, Side};
6	use chess_core::state::{GameStatus, WinReason};
7	use chess_core::view::{PlayerView, VisibleCell};
8	
9	use ratatui::layout::{Constraint, Direction, Layout, Rect};
10	use ratatui::style::{Color, Modifier, Style as TuiStyle};
11	use ratatui::text::{Line, Span};
12	use ratatui::widgets::{Block, Borders, Clear, Paragraph, Wrap};
13	use ratatui::Frame;
14	
15	use crate::app::{
16	    AppState, CreateRoomField, CreateRoomView, GameView, HostPromptView, LobbyView, NetRole,
17	    NetView, PickerEntry, PickerView, RectPx, Screen,
18	};
19	use crate::banner::{self, BannerKind, NeutralSide};
20	use crate::confetti::ConfettiAnim;
21	use crate::glyph::{self, Style};
22	use crate::orient;
23	use crate::text_input;
24	
25	const CELL_COLS: u16 = 4;
26	const CELL_ROWS: u16 = 2;
27	const RANK_LABEL_COLS: u16 = 3;
28	
29	pub fn draw(frame: &mut Frame, app: &mut AppState) {
30	    let area = frame.area();
31	    let app_style = app.style;
32	    match &app.screen {
33	        Screen::Picker(p) => draw_picker(frame, area, p, app_style),
34	        Screen::Game(_) => draw_game(frame, area, app),
35	        Screen::Net(_) => draw_net(frame, area, app),
36	        Screen::HostPrompt(h) => draw_host_prompt(frame, area, h, app.help_open),
37	        Screen::Lobby(l) => draw_lobby(frame, area, l, app.help_open),
38	        Screen::CreateRoom(c) => draw_create_room(frame, area, c),
39	    }
40	
41	    if app.rules_open {
42	        draw_rules_overlay(frame, area, app.style);
43	    }
44	    if app.quit_confirm_open {
45	        draw_quit_confirm_overlay(frame, area);
46	    }
47	}
48	
49	fn draw_picker(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, picker: &PickerView, style: Style) {
50	    let mut lines: Vec<Line> = Vec::new();
51	
52	    // Big "CHESS TUI" ASCII banner — only when the terminal is wide enough.
53	    // Narrow terminals (less than the banner width + a little padding) fall
54	    // back to the original single-line title so the picker still fits.
55	    let title_art = banner::art(BannerKind::AppTitle, style);
56	    let banner_w = banner::max_width(title_art);
57	    if (area.width as usize) >= banner_w + 4 {
58	        for row in title_art {
59	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
60	                row.to_string(),
61	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
62	            )));
63	        }
64	    } else {
65	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
66	            "chess-tui",
67	            TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
68	        )));
69	    }
70	    lines.push(Line::from(""));
71	    lines.push(Line::from(Span::raw("Choose a variant. Arrow keys + Enter; q to quit.")));
72	    lines.push(Line::from(""));
73	    for (i, entry) in PickerEntry::ALL.iter().enumerate() {
74	        let prefix = if i == picker.cursor { "▶ " } else { "  " };
75	        let row_style = if i == picker.cursor {
76	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)
77	        } else {
78	            TuiStyle::default()
79	        };
80	        lines.push(Line::from(vec![Span::raw(prefix), Span::styled(entry.label(), row_style)]));
81	    }
82	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Welcome ");
83	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
84	    frame.render_widget(para, area);
85	}
86	
87	fn draw_game(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, app: &mut AppState) {
88	    let chunks = Layout::default()
89	        .direction(Direction::Horizontal)
90	        .constraints([Constraint::Min(40), Constraint::Length(36)])
91	        .split(area);
92	
93	    let Screen::Game(g) = &app.screen else {
94	        return;
95	    };
96	    let g_ref: &GameView = g.as_ref();
97	    let observer = app.observer;
98	    let style = app.style;
99	    let use_color = app.use_color;
100	    let help_open = app.help_open;
101	    let show_check_banner = app.show_check_banner;
102	
103	    let view = PlayerView::project(&g_ref.state, g_ref.state.side_to_move);
104	    let mut rect = app.board_rect;
105	    draw_board(
106	        frame,
107	        chunks[0],
108	        observer,
109	        style,
110	        use_color,
111	        &view,
112	        g_ref.cursor,
113	        g_ref.selected,
114	        &mut rect,
115	    );
116	    app.board_rect = rect;
117	    draw_sidebar(frame, chunks[1], g_ref, &view, style, help_open, show_check_banner);
118	
119	    // Confetti + endgame banner. The board area is `chunks[0]`. We do this
120	    // after the sidebar render so the layer paints on top of the board only,
121	    // and after we've taken the `&app.screen` immutable borrow above.
122	    let board_area = chunks[0];
123	    let endgame_kind = endgame_kind_local(&view.status, observer);
124	    render_confetti_and_banner(frame, board_area, app, endgame_kind, style, use_color);
125	}
126	
127	fn draw_net(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, app: &mut AppState) {
128	    let chunks = Layout::default()
129	        .direction(Direction::Horizontal)
130	        .constraints([Constraint::Min(40), Constraint::Length(36)])
131	        .split(area);
132	
133	    let Screen::Net(n) = &app.screen else {
134	        return;
135	    };
136	    let n_ref: &NetView = n.as_ref();
137	    let style = app.style;
138	    let use_color = app.use_color;
139	    let help_open = app.help_open;
140	    let show_check_banner = app.show_check_banner;
141	    let observer = n_ref.role.map(|r| r.observer()).unwrap_or(app.observer);
142	
143	    match n_ref.last_view.as_ref() {
144	        Some(view) => {
145	            let view_status = view.status;
146	            let role = n_ref.role;
147	            let mut rect = app.board_rect;
148	            draw_board(
149	                frame,
150	                chunks[0],
151	                observer,
152	                style,
153	                use_color,
154	                view,
155	                n_ref.cursor,
156	                n_ref.selected,
157	                &mut rect,
158	            );
159	            app.board_rect = rect;
160	            draw_sidebar_net(frame, chunks[1], n_ref, view, style, help_open, show_check_banner);
161	
162	            let board_area = chunks[0];
163	            let endgame_kind = endgame_kind_net(&view_status, role);
164	            render_confetti_and_banner(frame, board_area, app, endgame_kind, style, use_color);
165	        }
166	        None => {
167	            draw_connecting_placeholder(frame, chunks[0], n_ref);
168	            draw_sidebar_net_idle(frame, chunks[1], n_ref);
169	        }
170	    }
171	}
172	
173	fn draw_connecting_placeholder(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, n: &NetView) {
174	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Net ");
175	    let lines = vec![
176	        Line::from(""),
177	        Line::from(Span::styled("  Connecting…", TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD))),
178	        Line::from(Span::styled(format!("  → {}", n.url), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Gray))),
179	        Line::from(""),
180	        Line::from(Span::styled(
181	            n.last_msg.clone().unwrap_or_else(|| "  (waiting for server hello)".into()),
182	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow),
183	        )),
184	    ];
185	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
186	    frame.render_widget(para, area);
187	}
188	
189	fn draw_sidebar_net_idle(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, n: &NetView) {
190	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Status ");
191	    let lines = vec![
192	        Line::from(Span::styled("Connecting…", TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD))),
193	        Line::from(format!("URL: {}", n.url)),
194	        Line::from(""),
195	        Line::from(Span::styled("Press q to give up.", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray))),
196	    ];
197	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
198	    frame.render_widget(para, area);
199	}
200	
201	fn draw_host_prompt(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, h: &HostPromptView, help_open: bool) {
202	    let title =
203	        Span::styled("Connect to chess-net", TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD));
204	    let mut lines = vec![
205	        Line::from(title),
206	        Line::from(""),
207	        Line::from(Span::raw("Server URL (e.g. ws://127.0.0.1:7878):")),
208	        Line::from(vec![
209	            Span::raw("  "),
210	            Span::styled(format!("{}_", h.buf), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)),
211	        ]),
212	        Line::from(""),
213	    ];
214	    if let Some(err) = h.error.as_deref() {
215	        lines
216	            .push(Line::from(Span::styled(format!("× {err}"), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Red))));
217	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
218	    }
219	    if help_open {
220	        for ln in HELP_LINES_HOST_PROMPT {
221	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(*ln, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray))));
222	        }
223	    } else {
224	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
225	            "Enter to connect, Esc to go back, ? for help.",
226	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray),
227	        )));
228	    }
229	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Online ");
230	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
231	    frame.render_widget(para, area);
232	}
233	
234	fn draw_lobby(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, l: &LobbyView, help_open: bool) {
235	    // Two columns: room list (left) + status/help (right). When the user is
236	    // mid-password-prompt, overlay a small modal.
237	    let chunks = Layout::default()
238	        .direction(Direction::Horizontal)
239	        .constraints([Constraint::Min(40), Constraint::Length(36)])
240	        .split(area);
241	
242	    let header_style = TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray);
243	    let mut lines: Vec<Line<'static>> = Vec::with_capacity(l.rooms.len() + 4);
244	    lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
245	        format!("Lobby — {}", l.host),
246	        TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
247	    )));
248	    lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
249	        format!("{:<20} {:<14} {:<6} {:<6} {:<8}", "Room", "Variant", "Seats", "Watch", "Status"),
250	        header_style,
251	    )));
252	    if l.rooms.is_empty() {
253	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
254	            "  (no rooms yet — press 'c' to create one)",
255	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray),
256	        )));
257	    } else {
258	        for (i, r) in l.rooms.iter().enumerate() {
259	            let prefix = if i == l.cursor { "▶ " } else { "  " };
260	            let lock = if r.has_password { "🔒" } else { "  " };
261	            let status = match r.status {
262	                chess_net::RoomStatus::Lobby => "lobby",
263	                chess_net::RoomStatus::Playing => "playing",
264	                chess_net::RoomStatus::Finished => "finished",
265	            };
266	            let cell_style = if i == l.cursor {
267	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)
268	            } else {
269	                TuiStyle::default()
270	            };
271	            let spec_label =
272	                if r.spectators == 0 { "—".to_string() } else { format!("{}👁", r.spectators) };
273	            lines.push(Line::from(vec![
274	                Span::raw(prefix),
275	                Span::raw(lock),
276	                Span::raw(" "),
277	                Span::styled(
278	                    format!(
279	                        "{:<18} {:<14} {}/2   {:<6} {:<8}",
280	                        r.id, r.variant, r.seats, spec_label, status
281	                    ),
282	                    cell_style,
283	                ),
284	            ]));
285	        }
286	    }
287	
288	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Lobby ");
289	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
290	    frame.render_widget(para, chunks[0]);
291	
292	    draw_lobby_sidebar(frame, chunks[1], l, help_open);
293	
294	    if let Some(pj) = l.pending_join.as_ref() {
295	        let modal = Rect {
296	            x: area.x + area.width / 4,
297	            y: area.y + area.height / 3,
298	            width: (area.width / 2).max(40),
299	            height: 7,
300	        };
301	        frame.render_widget(Clear, modal);
302	        let lines = vec![
303	            Line::from(Span::styled(
304	                format!("Join '{}' — locked", pj.room_id),
305	                TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
306	            )),
307	            Line::from(""),
308	            Line::from(vec![
309	                Span::raw("Password: "),
310	                Span::styled(
311	                    format!("{}_", text_input::mask(&pj.password_buf)),
312	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow),
313	                ),
314	            ]),
315	            Line::from(""),
316	            Line::from(Span::styled(
317	                "Enter to join, Esc to cancel.",
318	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray),
319	            )),
320	        ];
321	        let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Password ");
322	        frame.render_widget(Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false }), modal);
323	    }
324	}
325	
326	fn draw_lobby_sidebar(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, l: &LobbyView, help_open: bool) {
327	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Status ");
328	    let mut lines = vec![Line::from(vec![
329	        Span::raw("Connection: "),
330	        Span::styled(
331	            if l.connected { "ws live" } else { "connecting…" },
332	            TuiStyle::default().fg(if l.connected { Color::Green } else { Color::Yellow }),
333	        ),
334	    ])];
335	    lines.push(Line::from(format!("Rooms: {}", l.rooms.len())));
336	    lines.push(Line::from(""));
337	    if let Some(msg) = l.last_msg.as_deref() {
338	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(msg.to_string(), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Cyan))));
339	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
340	    }
341	    if help_open {
342	        for ln in HELP_LINES_LOBBY {
343	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(*ln, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray))));
344	        }
345	    } else {
346	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
347	            "Enter=join, w=watch, c=create, r=refresh, Esc=back, ?=help, q=quit.",
348	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray),
349	        )));
350	    }
351	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
352	    frame.render_widget(para, area);
353	}
354	
355	fn draw_create_room(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, c: &CreateRoomView) {
356	    let title = Span::styled("Create room", TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD));
357	    let id_active = matches!(c.focus, CreateRoomField::Id);
358	    let pw_active = matches!(c.focus, CreateRoomField::Password);
359	    let submit_active = matches!(c.focus, CreateRoomField::Submit);
360	    let mut lines = vec![
361	        Line::from(title),
362	        Line::from(format!("Server: {}", c.host)),
363	        Line::from(""),
364	        Line::from(Span::raw("Room id (1–32 chars, [a-zA-Z0-9_-]):")),
365	        Line::from(vec![
366	            Span::raw(if id_active { "▶ " } else { "  " }),
367	            Span::styled(
368	                if id_active { format!("{}_", c.id_buf) } else { c.id_buf.clone() },
369	                if id_active {
370	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)
371	                } else {
372	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Gray)
373	                },
374	            ),
375	        ]),
376	        Line::from(""),
377	        Line::from(Span::raw("Password (optional, leave blank for open room):")),
378	        Line::from(vec![
379	            Span::raw(if pw_active { "▶ " } else { "  " }),
380	            Span::styled(
381	                if pw_active {
382	                    format!("{}_", text_input::mask(&c.password_buf))
383	                } else {
384	                    text_input::mask(&c.password_buf)
385	                },
386	                if pw_active {
387	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)
388	                } else {
389	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Gray)
390	                },
391	            ),
392	        ]),
393	        Line::from(""),
394	        Line::from(vec![
395	            Span::raw(if submit_active { "▶ " } else { "  " }),
396	            Span::styled(
397	                "[ Create & join ]",
398	                if submit_active {
399	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)
400	                } else {
401	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Gray)
402	                },
403	            ),
404	        ]),
405	    ];
406	    if let Some(err) = c.error.as_deref() {
407	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
408	        lines
409	            .push(Line::from(Span::styled(format!("× {err}"), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Red))));
410	    }
411	    lines.push(Line::from(""));
412	    lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
413	        "Tab/Shift-Tab: switch field. Enter on submit creates the room. Esc: back.",
414	        TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray),
415	    )));
416	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" New room ");
417	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
418	    frame.render_widget(para, area);
419	}
420	
421	const HELP_LINES_HOST_PROMPT: &[&str] = &[
422	    "Type a server URL like  ws://192.168.1.5:7878",
423	    "Schemes: ws://  wss://  http(s):// auto-converts.",
424	    "Enter      open the lobby for that host",
425	    "Esc        back to the variant picker",
426	    "?          toggle this help",
427	    "Ctrl-C     quit",
428	];
429	
430	const HELP_LINES_LOBBY: &[&str] = &[
431	    "j k / ↓ ↑   move cursor",
432	    "Enter       join the highlighted room (prompts for password if locked)",
433	    "w           watch the highlighted room as a spectator (read-only)",
434	    "c           create a new room",
435	    "r           force-refresh room list (server pushes automatically)",
436	    "Esc         back to host prompt",
437	    "?           toggle this help",
438	    "q / Ctrl-C  quit",
439	];
440	
441	#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
442	fn draw_board(
443	    frame: &mut Frame,
444	    area: Rect,
445	    observer: Side,
446	    style: Style,
447	    use_color: bool,
448	    view: &PlayerView,
449	    cursor: (u8, u8),
450	    selected: Option<Square>,
451	    board_rect: &mut Option<RectPx>,
452	) {
453	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Board ");
454	    let inner = block.inner(area);
455	    frame.render_widget(block, area);
456	
457	    let shape = view.shape;
458	    let (rows, cols) = orient::display_dims(shape);
459	    let model_w = shape.dimensions().0;
460	
461	    // Build legal-target highlight set when a piece is selected.
462	    let highlight: std::collections::HashSet<Square> = match selected {
463	        Some(from) => view
464	            .legal_moves
465	            .iter()
466	            .filter(|m| m.origin_square() == from)
467	            .filter_map(|m| m.to_square())
468	            .collect(),
469	        None => std::collections::HashSet::new(),
470	    };
471	
472	    let border_style = TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray);
473	    let mut lines: Vec<Line> = Vec::with_capacity(rows as usize * 2 + 2);
474	
475	    // File header (top)
476	    lines.push(file_header_line(observer, shape));
477	
478	    let river_after = if matches!(shape, BoardShape::Xiangqi9x10) { Some(4u8) } else { None };
479	
480	    for display_row in 0..rows {
481	        lines.push(rank_row(
482	            view,
483	            observer,
484	            shape,
485	            display_row,
486	            cols,
487	            model_w,
488	            &highlight,
489	            cursor,
490	            selected,
491	            style,
492	            use_color,
493	            border_style,
494	        ));
495	
496	        // Between row (skip after last rank)
497	        if display_row + 1 == rows {
498	            // no between row after the final rank
499	        } else if river_after == Some(display_row) {
500	            lines.push(river_line(cols, style));
501	        } else {
502	            lines.push(between_row(observer, shape, display_row, cols, style, border_style));
503	        }
504	    }
505	
506	    // File header (bottom)
507	    lines.push(file_header_line(observer, shape));
508	
509	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines);
510	    frame.render_widget(para, inner);
511	
512	    *board_rect = Some(RectPx {
513	        x: inner.x,
514	        y: inner.y,
515	        cell_cols: CELL_COLS,
516	        cell_rows: CELL_ROWS,
517	        // file header (1)
518	        top_pad: 1,
519	        // rank label (3)
520	        left_pad: RANK_LABEL_COLS,
521	    });
522	}
523	
524	#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
525	fn rank_row<'a>(
526	    view: &'a PlayerView,
527	    observer: Side,
528	    shape: BoardShape,
529	    display_row: u8,
530	    cols: u8,
531	    model_w: u8,
532	    highlight: &std::collections::HashSet<Square>,
533	    cursor: (u8, u8),
534	    selected: Option<Square>,
535	    style: Style,
536	    use_color: bool,
537	    border_style: TuiStyle,
538	) -> Line<'a> {
539	    let mut spans: Vec<Span> = Vec::with_capacity(cols as usize * 2 + 1);
540	    spans.push(Span::raw(rank_label(observer, shape, display_row)));
541	
542	    for display_col in 0..cols {
543	        let sq = orient::square_at_display(display_row, display_col, observer, shape);
544	        let (content, st, is_piece_or_glyph) = match sq {
545	            Some(sq) => intersection_or_piece(
546	                view,
547	                sq,
548	                model_w,
549	                shape,
550	                highlight,
551	                cursor,
552	                selected,
553	                style,
554	                use_color,
555	                display_row,
556	                display_col,
557	            ),
558	            None => (intersection_glyph(false, style).to_string(), TuiStyle::default(), false),
559	        };
560	
561	        spans.push(Span::styled(content, st));
562	
563	        // Connector to next cell or trailing pad on last cell
564	        if display_col + 1 < cols {
565	            let connector = horizontal_connector(is_piece_or_glyph, style);
566	            spans.push(Span::styled(connector, border_style));
567	        } else if !is_piece_or_glyph {
568	            // Last cell with 1-col content: pad to 2 cols so all rows have
569	            // a consistent total width.
570	            spans.push(Span::raw(" "));
571	        }
572	    }
573	
574	    Line::from(spans)
575	}
576	
577	/// Per-cell content for a rank row.
578	/// Returns `(content_str, content_style, content_is_glyph_width_2)`.
579	/// `content_is_glyph_width_2` is true for revealed pieces and hidden banqi
580	/// pieces (which use a 2-col glyph); false for empty intersections (1 col).
581	#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
582	fn intersection_or_piece(
583	    view: &PlayerView,
584	    sq: Square,
585	    model_w: u8,
586	    shape: BoardShape,
587	    highlight: &std::collections::HashSet<Square>,
588	    cursor: (u8, u8),
589	    selected: Option<Square>,
590	    style: Style,
591	    use_color: bool,
592	    display_row: u8,
593	    display_col: u8,
594	) -> (String, TuiStyle, bool) {
595	    let cell = &view.cells[sq.0 as usize];
596	    let is_cursor = (display_row, display_col) == cursor;
597	    let is_selected = selected == Some(sq);
598	    let is_target = highlight.contains(&sq);
599	
600	    let (text, is_glyph_w2) = match cell {
601	        VisibleCell::Empty => {
602	            let palace_center = is_palace_center(sq, model_w, shape);
603	            (intersection_glyph(palace_center, style).to_string(), false)
604	        }
605	        VisibleCell::Hidden => (glyph::hidden(style).to_string(), true),
606	        VisibleCell::Revealed(pos) => {
607	            (glyph::glyph(pos.piece.kind, pos.piece.side, style).to_string(), true)
608	        }
609	    };
610	
611	    let mut s = TuiStyle::default();
612	    if use_color {
613	        if let VisibleCell::Revealed(pos) = cell {
614	            s = s.fg(side_color(pos.piece.side));
615	            if !pos.revealed {
616	                s = s.add_modifier(Modifier::DIM);
617	            }
618	            if pos.piece.kind == PieceKind::General {
619	                s = s.add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD);
620	            }
621	        } else if matches!(cell, VisibleCell::Hidden) {
622	            s = s.fg(Color::DarkGray);
623	        } else if is_palace_center(sq, model_w, shape) {
624	            s = s.fg(Color::Yellow);
625	        } else {
626	            s = s.fg(Color::DarkGray);
627	        }
628	    }
629	    if is_target {
630	        s = s.bg(Color::Rgb(40, 80, 40));
631	    }
632	    if is_selected {
633	        s = s.bg(Color::Rgb(80, 60, 20)).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD);
634	    }
635	    if is_cursor {
636	        s = s.bg(Color::Rgb(60, 60, 100)).add_modifier(Modifier::REVERSED);
637	    }
638	    (text, s, is_glyph_w2)
639	}
640	
641	fn is_palace_center(sq: Square, model_w: u8, shape: BoardShape) -> bool {
642	    if !matches!(shape, BoardShape::Xiangqi9x10) {
643	        return false;
644	    }
645	    let f = (sq.0 % model_w as u16) as u8;
646	    let r = (sq.0 / model_w as u16) as u8;
647	    f == 4 && (r == 1 || r == 8)
648	}
649	
650	fn intersection_glyph(palace_center: bool, style: Style) -> &'static str {
651	    match (palace_center, style) {
652	        (true, Style::Cjk) => "╳",
653	        (true, Style::Ascii) => "X",
654	        (false, Style::Cjk) => "┼",
655	        (false, Style::Ascii) => "+",
656	    }
657	}
658	
659	fn horizontal_connector(content_is_w2: bool, style: Style) -> &'static str {
660	    let dash: char = match style {
661	        Style::Cjk => '─',
662	        Style::Ascii => '-',
663	    };
664	    if content_is_w2 {
665	        // 2-col content (piece) leaves 2 cols for connector.
666	        match dash {
667	            '─' => "──",
668	            _ => "--",
669	        }
670	    } else {
671	        // 1-col content (intersection) leaves 3 cols for connector.
672	        match dash {
673	            '─' => "───",
674	            _ => "---",
675	        }
676	    }
677	}
678	
679	fn between_row(
680	    observer: Side,
681	    shape: BoardShape,
682	    display_row_above: u8,
683	    cols: u8,
684	    style: Style,
685	    border_style: TuiStyle,
686	) -> Line<'static> {
687	    let vbar: char = match style {
688	        Style::Cjk => '│',
689	        Style::Ascii => '|',
690	    };
691	    let diagonals = palace_diagonals(display_row_above, observer, shape, style);
692	
693	    let mut s = String::from("   "); // rank label
694	    for cell_idx in 0..cols {
695	        s.push(vbar);
696	        if cell_idx + 1 < cols {
697	            // 3-space gap, possibly with a diagonal char in the middle
698	            // for palace between-rows. cell_idx is the index of the LEFT
699	            // cell of the gap. Diagonals appear between cells (3, 4) and (4, 5).
700	            let diag_char = match (diagonals, cell_idx) {
701	                (Some((left_diag, _)), 3) => Some(left_diag),
702	                (Some((_, right_diag)), 4) => Some(right_diag),
703	                _ => None,
704	            };
705	            match diag_char {
706	                Some(c) => {
707	                    s.push(' ');
708	                    s.push(c);
709	                    s.push(' ');
710	                }
711	                None => s.push_str("   "),
712	            }
713	        }
714	    }
715	    // Trailing space so the row width matches rank rows (34 cols of content
716	    // + 3 of rank label).
717	    s.push(' ');
718	    Line::from(Span::styled(s, border_style))
719	}
720	
721	/// For a between-row sitting between display rows N and N+1, returns the
722	/// (left, right) diagonal characters if this between-row crosses a palace.
723	/// Otherwise None.
724	fn palace_diagonals(
725	    display_row_above: u8,
726	    observer: Side,
727	    shape: BoardShape,
728	    style: Style,
729	) -> Option<(char, char)> {
730	    if !matches!(shape, BoardShape::Xiangqi9x10) {
731	        return None;
732	    }
733	    let top_sq = orient::square_at_display(display_row_above, 4, observer, shape)?;
734	    let bot_sq = orient::square_at_display(display_row_above + 1, 4, observer, shape)?;
735	    let top_rank = (top_sq.0 / 9) as u8;
736	    let bot_rank = (bot_sq.0 / 9) as u8;
737	    let (low, high) = if top_rank < bot_rank { (top_rank, bot_rank) } else { (bot_rank, top_rank) };
738	
739	    let center_rank = match (low, high) {
740	        (0, 1) | (1, 2) => 1u8,
741	        (7, 8) | (8, 9) => 8u8,
742	        _ => return None,
743	    };
744	
745	    let top_dist = (top_rank as i32 - center_rank as i32).abs();
746	    let bot_dist = (bot_rank as i32 - center_rank as i32).abs();
747	    let converging = bot_dist < top_dist;
748	
749	    let (left_cjk, right_cjk) = if converging { ('╲', '╱') } else { ('╱', '╲') };
750	    let (left, right) = match style {
751	        Style::Cjk => (left_cjk, right_cjk),
752	        Style::Ascii => (if converging { '\\' } else { '/' }, if converging { '/' } else { '\\' }),
753	    };
754	    Some((left, right))
755	}
756	
757	fn river_line(cols: u8, style: Style) -> Line<'static> {
758	    // The river replaces the between-row entirely; there are no vertical
759	    // bars connecting through it. Total width must match a rank row:
760	    //   rank label (3) + grid (cols * 4 - 2) + trailing pad to align.
761	    let target_width = (cols as usize) * 4 - 2;
762	    let banner = match style {
763	        Style::Cjk => "〇 楚 河 ── 漢 界 〇",
764	        Style::Ascii => "~ river -- river ~",
765	    };
766	    let mut s = String::from("   "); // rank label
767	    let banner_w = visual_width(banner);
768	    let pad = target_width.saturating_sub(banner_w);
769	    let left_pad = pad / 2;
770	    let right_pad = pad - left_pad;
771	    for _ in 0..left_pad {
772	        s.push(' ');
773	    }
774	    s.push_str(banner);
775	    for _ in 0..right_pad {
776	        s.push(' ');
777	    }
778	    Line::from(Span::styled(s, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Cyan).add_modifier(Modifier::DIM)))
779	}
780	
781	/// Approximate display width: CJK chars count as 2 cols, others as 1.
782	fn visual_width(s: &str) -> usize {
783	    s.chars()
784	        .map(|c| {
785	            let cp = c as u32;
786	            // East Asian Wide ranges (rough). Covers CJK Unified, Hangul,
787	            // box-drawing isn't wide. This is "good enough" — a real fix
788	            // would pull in unicode-width.
789	            if (0x1100..=0x115F).contains(&cp)
790	                || (0x2E80..=0x303E).contains(&cp)
791	                || (0x3041..=0x33FF).contains(&cp)
792	                || (0x3400..=0x4DBF).contains(&cp)
793	                || (0x4E00..=0x9FFF).contains(&cp)
794	                || (0xA000..=0xA4CF).contains(&cp)
795	                || (0xAC00..=0xD7A3).contains(&cp)
796	                || (0xF900..=0xFAFF).contains(&cp)
797	                || (0xFE30..=0xFE4F).contains(&cp)
798	                || (0xFF00..=0xFF60).contains(&cp)
799	                || (0xFFE0..=0xFFE6).contains(&cp)
800	            {
801	                2
802	            } else {
803	                1
804	            }
805	        })
806	        .sum()
807	}
808	
809	fn file_header_line(observer: Side, shape: BoardShape) -> Line<'static> {
810	    let (w, _) = shape.dimensions();
811	    let (_, cols) = orient::display_dims(shape);
812	    // Each cell takes 4 cols (label at col 0, then 3 spaces). Last cell
813	    // has just the label + 1 trailing space to match rank-row width.
814	    let mut s = String::from("   "); // rank label
815	    for display_col in 0..cols {
816	        let label = file_label_for_col(display_col, w, shape, observer);
817	        s.push(label);
818	        if display_col + 1 < cols {
819	            s.push_str("   ");
820	        } else {
821	            s.push(' '); // trailing pad
822	        }
823	    }
824	    Line::from(Span::styled(s, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)))
825	}
826	
827	fn file_label_for_col(col: u8, model_w: u8, shape: BoardShape, observer: Side) -> char {
828	    let sq = orient::square_at_display(0, col, observer, shape);
829	    match (shape, sq) {
830	        // Banqi displays transposed (8 cols × 4 rows). Display columns
831	        // therefore correspond to model RANKS (0–7), and rows to files (a–d).
832	        (BoardShape::Banqi4x8, Some(sq)) => {
833	            let r = (sq.0 / model_w as u16) as u8;
834	            (b'0' + r) as char
835	        }
836	        (_, Some(sq)) => {
837	            let f = (sq.0 % model_w as u16) as u8;
838	            (b'a' + f) as char
839	        }
840	        _ => '?',
841	    }
842	}
843	
844	fn rank_label(observer: Side, shape: BoardShape, display_row: u8) -> String {
845	    let sq = orient::square_at_display(display_row, 0, observer, shape);
846	    let model_w = shape.dimensions().0;
847	    match (shape, sq) {
848	        (BoardShape::Banqi4x8, Some(sq)) => {
849	            // Banqi rows = model files; show as a–d.
850	            let f = (sq.0 % model_w as u16) as u8;
851	            format!(" {} ", (b'a' + f) as char)
852	        }
853	        (_, Some(sq)) => {
854	            let r = (sq.0 / model_w as u16) as u8;
855	            format!(" {} ", r)
856	        }
857	        _ => "   ".to_string(),
858	    }
859	}
860	
861	fn side_color(side: Side) -> Color {
862	    match side {
863	        Side::RED => Color::Red,
864	        Side::BLACK => Color::White,
865	        _ => Color::Green,
866	    }
867	}
868	
869	fn draw_sidebar(
870	    frame: &mut Frame,
871	    area: Rect,
872	    g: &GameView,
873	    view: &PlayerView,
874	    style: Style,
875	    help_open: bool,
876	    show_check_banner: bool,
877	) {
878	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Status ");
879	    let inner = block.inner(area);
880	    frame.render_widget(block, area);
881	
882	    let mut lines: Vec<Line> = Vec::new();
883	
884	    // Game-over banner (takes priority).
885	    if let Some(banner) = game_over_banner(&view.status, style) {
886	        for l in banner {
887	            lines.push(l);
888	        }
889	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
890	    }
891	
892	    let variant_label = match view.shape {
893	        BoardShape::Xiangqi9x10 => {
894	            // Casual is the TUI default; strict is the alternative.
895	            if g.state.rules.xiangqi_allow_self_check {
896	                "Xiangqi (象棋)"
897	            } else {
898	                "Xiangqi (象棋, strict)"
899	            }
900	        }
901	        BoardShape::Banqi4x8 => "Banqi (暗棋)",
902	        BoardShape::ThreeKingdom => "三國暗棋",
903	        BoardShape::Custom { .. } => "Custom",
904	    };
905	    lines.push(line_label_value("Variant:", variant_label));
906	
907	    // Side-to-move only makes sense while the game is ongoing; once it's
908	    // Won/Drawn the banner above already shows the winner. Display the
909	    // piece-colour (`current_color`), which diverges from `side_to_move`
910	    // (the seat) after a banqi first-flip.
911	    if matches!(view.status, GameStatus::Ongoing) {
912	        let stm_color = side_color(view.current_color);
913	        lines.push(Line::from(vec![
914	            Span::styled("Side to move:", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)),
915	            Span::raw(" "),
916	            Span::styled(
917	                glyph::side_name(view.current_color, style),
918	                TuiStyle::default().fg(stm_color).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
919	            ),
920	        ]));
921	
922	        if show_check_banner
923	            && matches!(view.shape, BoardShape::Xiangqi9x10)
924	            && g.state.is_in_check(view.side_to_move)
925	        {
926	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
927	                "  ⚠ CHECK 將軍 — your general is under attack",
928	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Red).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
929	            )));
930	        }
931	    }
932	
933	    let (status_text, status_color) = format_status_short(view.status, style);
934	    lines.push(Line::from(vec![
935	        Span::styled("Status:", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)),
936	        Span::raw(" "),
937	        Span::styled(status_text, TuiStyle::default().fg(status_color)),
938	    ]));
939	    lines.push(line_label_value("Legal moves:", &view.legal_moves.len().to_string()));
940	    lines.push(line_label_value("History:", &g.state.history.len().to_string()));
941	
942	    let selected_label = match g.selected {
943	        Some(sq) => chess_core::notation::iccs::encode_square(&g.state.board, sq),
944	        None => "—".into(),
945	    };
946	    lines.push(line_label_value("Selected:", &selected_label));
947	
948	    lines.push(Line::from(""));
949	    if let Some(msg) = &g.last_msg {
950	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(msg.clone(), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow))));
951	    }
952	
953	    if help_open {
954	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
955	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
956	            "Help",
957	            TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
958	        )));
959	        for ln in HELP_LINES {
960	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::raw(*ln)));
961	        }
962	    } else {
963	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
964	        if let Some(ci) = &g.coord_input {
965	            lines.push(Line::from(vec![
966	                Span::styled("> ", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)),
967	                Span::styled(format!("{}_", ci.buf), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)),
968	            ]));
969	        } else {
970	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
971	                "?=help, r=rules, : / m=coord, n=new, q=quit",
972	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray),
973	            )));
974	        }
975	    }
976	
977	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
978	    frame.render_widget(para, inner);
979	}
980	
981	fn draw_sidebar_net(
982	    frame: &mut Frame,
983	    area: Rect,
984	    n: &NetView,
985	    view: &PlayerView,
986	    style: Style,
987	    help_open: bool,
988	    show_check_banner: bool,
989	) {
990	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Status (net) ");
991	    let inner = block.inner(area);
992	    frame.render_widget(block, area);
993	
994	    // Split the sidebar into "meta info" (top) and "chat region" (bottom).
995	    // The chat region keeps a scrolling log + a single input row when the
996	    // user is composing. Meta height is dynamic (grows to fit) and chat
997	    // gets the rest.
998	    let chat_input_active = n.chat_input.is_some();
999	    let chat_h = inner.height.saturating_sub(MIN_META_ROWS).max(MIN_CHAT_ROWS);
1000	    let meta_h = inner.height.saturating_sub(chat_h);
1001	    let chunks = Layout::default()
1002	        .direction(Direction::Vertical)
1003	        .constraints([Constraint::Length(meta_h), Constraint::Length(chat_h)])
1004	        .split(inner);
1005	
1006	    let mut lines: Vec<Line> = Vec::new();
1007	
1008	    if let Some(banner) = game_over_banner(&view.status, style) {
1009	        for l in banner {
1010	            lines.push(l);
1011	        }
1012	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
1013	    }
1014	
1015	    let variant_label = match (view.shape, n.rules.as_ref()) {
1016	        (BoardShape::Xiangqi9x10, Some(r)) => {
1017	            if r.xiangqi_allow_self_check {
1018	                "Xiangqi (象棋)"
1019	            } else {
1020	                "Xiangqi (象棋, strict)"
1021	            }
1022	        }
1023	        (BoardShape::Xiangqi9x10, None) => "Xiangqi (象棋)",
1024	        (BoardShape::Banqi4x8, _) => "Banqi (暗棋)",
1025	        (BoardShape::ThreeKingdom, _) => "三國暗棋",
1026	        (BoardShape::Custom { .. }, _) => "Custom",
1027	    };
1028	    lines.push(line_label_value("Variant:", variant_label));
1029	
1030	    match n.role {
1031	        Some(NetRole::Player(side)) => {
1032	            let c = side_color(side);
1033	            lines.push(Line::from(vec![
1034	                Span::styled("You:", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)),
1035	                Span::raw(" "),
1036	                Span::styled(
1037	                    glyph::side_name(side, style),
1038	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(c).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1039	                ),
1040	            ]));
1041	        }
1042	        Some(NetRole::Spectator) => {
1043	            lines.push(Line::from(vec![
1044	                Span::styled("You:", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)),
1045	                Span::raw(" "),
1046	                Span::styled(
1047	                    "Spectator (read-only)",
1048	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1049	                ),
1050	            ]));
1051	        }
1052	        None => {}
1053	    }
1054	
1055	    if matches!(view.status, GameStatus::Ongoing) {
1056	        // "Your turn?" depends on the observer's SEAT (side_to_move) but
1057	        // the displayed colour is the piece-colour the seat plays
1058	        // (`current_color`). For banqi the two diverge after the first
1059	        // flip; for xiangqi they're identical.
1060	        let stm_color = side_color(view.current_color);
1061	        let observer_side = n.role.and_then(|r| match r {
1062	            NetRole::Player(s) => Some(s),
1063	            NetRole::Spectator => None,
1064	        });
1065	        let label = match observer_side {
1066	            Some(obs) if obs == view.side_to_move => "Your turn:",
1067	            Some(_) => "Opponent:",
1068	            None => "To move:",
1069	        };
1070	        lines.push(Line::from(vec![
1071	            Span::styled(label, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)),
1072	            Span::raw(" "),
1073	            Span::styled(
1074	                glyph::side_name(view.current_color, style),
1075	                TuiStyle::default().fg(stm_color).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1076	            ),
1077	        ]));
1078	
1079	        // Check banner: `view.in_check` is set by the server in v4+ from the
1080	        // observer's POV (or Red's POV for spectators). So Players read it
1081	        // as "my own general"; Spectators read it as "Red's general".
1082	        if show_check_banner && matches!(view.shape, BoardShape::Xiangqi9x10) && view.in_check {
1083	            let msg = match n.role {
1084	                Some(NetRole::Player(_)) => "  ⚠ CHECK 將軍 — your general is under attack",
1085	                Some(NetRole::Spectator) => "  ⚠ CHECK 將軍 — Red's general is under attack",
1086	                None => "  ⚠ CHECK 將軍",
1087	            };
1088	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
1089	                msg,
1090	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Red).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1091	            )));
1092	        }
1093	    }
1094	
1095	    let (status_text, status_color) = format_status_short(view.status, style);
1096	    lines.push(Line::from(vec![
1097	        Span::styled("Status:", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)),
1098	        Span::raw(" "),
1099	        Span::styled(status_text, TuiStyle::default().fg(status_color)),
1100	    ]));
1101	    lines.push(line_label_value("Legal moves:", &view.legal_moves.len().to_string()));
1102	
1103	    let selected_label = match n.selected {
1104	        Some(sq) => format!("sq {}", sq.0),
1105	        None => "—".into(),
1106	    };
1107	    lines.push(line_label_value("Selected:", &selected_label));
1108	
1109	    lines.push(line_label_value("Server:", &n.url));
1110	    lines.push(line_label_value("Connection:", if n.connected { "live" } else { "disconnected" }));
1111	
1112	    lines.push(Line::from(""));
1113	    if let Some(msg) = &n.last_msg {
1114	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(msg.clone(), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow))));
1115	    }
1116	
1117	    if help_open {
1118	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
1119	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
1120	            "Help",
1121	            TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1122	        )));
1123	        for ln in HELP_LINES_NET {
1124	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::raw(*ln)));
1125	        }
1126	    } else {
1127	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
1128	        if let Some(ci) = &n.coord_input {
1129	            lines.push(Line::from(vec![
1130	                Span::styled("> ", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)),
1131	                Span::styled(format!("{}_", ci.buf), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)),
1132	            ]));
1133	        } else {
1134	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
1135	                "?=help, r=rules, t=chat, : / m=coord, q=quit",
1136	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray),
1137	            )));
1138	        }
1139	    }
1140	
1141	    let meta_para = Paragraph::new(lines).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
1142	    frame.render_widget(meta_para, chunks[0]);
1143	
1144	    draw_chat_pane(frame, chunks[1], n, chat_input_active);
1145	}
1146	
1147	const MIN_META_ROWS: u16 = 14;
1148	const MIN_CHAT_ROWS: u16 = 6;
1149	
1150	fn draw_chat_pane(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, n: &NetView, input_active: bool) {
1151	    let block = Block::default()
1152	        .borders(Borders::TOP)
1153	        .border_style(TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray))
1154	        .title(" Chat ");
1155	    let inner = block.inner(area);
1156	    frame.render_widget(block, area);
1157	    if inner.height == 0 {
1158	        return;
1159	    }
1160	
1161	    // Reserve the bottom row for the input prompt (or hint when not typing).
1162	    let log_h = inner.height.saturating_sub(1);
1163	    let log_area = Rect { x: inner.x, y: inner.y, width: inner.width, height: log_h };
1164	    let input_area = Rect { x: inner.x, y: inner.y + log_h, width: inner.width, height: 1 };
1165	
1166	    let visible = log_h as usize;
1167	    // Show the most recent N lines (cap by visible height) so the buffer
1168	    // stays scrolled to the bottom on every render.
1169	    let start = n.chat.len().saturating_sub(visible);
1170	    let mut log_lines: Vec<Line> = Vec::with_capacity(visible);
1171	    if n.chat.is_empty() {
1172	        log_lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
1173	            "(no messages yet)",
1174	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray),
1175	        )));
1176	    } else {
1177	        for line in n.chat.iter().skip(start) {
1178	            log_lines.push(format_chat_line(line));
1179	        }
1180	    }
1181	    let log_para = Paragraph::new(log_lines).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
1182	    frame.render_widget(log_para, log_area);
1183	
1184	    let input_line = if input_active {
1185	        let buf = n.chat_input.as_deref().unwrap_or("");
1186	        Line::from(vec![
1187	            Span::styled("> ", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)),
1188	            Span::styled(format!("{}_", buf), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)),
1189	        ])
1190	    } else {
1191	        let hint = match n.role {
1192	            Some(NetRole::Spectator) => "(spectator — read-only)",
1193	            Some(NetRole::Player(_)) => "Press 't' to chat.",
1194	            None => "",
1195	        };
1196	        Line::from(Span::styled(hint, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)))
1197	    };
1198	    frame.render_widget(Paragraph::new(input_line).wrap(Wrap { trim: false }), input_area);
1199	}
1200	
1201	fn format_chat_line(line: &chess_net::ChatLine) -> Line<'static> {
1202	    let from_label = match line.from {
1203	        Side::RED => "Red:",
1204	        Side::BLACK => "Black:",
1205	        _ => "Green:",
1206	    };
1207	    let from_color = side_color(line.from);
1208	    Line::from(vec![
1209	        Span::styled(
1210	            from_label.to_string(),
1211	            TuiStyle::default().fg(from_color).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1212	        ),
1213	        Span::raw(" "),
1214	        Span::raw(line.text.clone()),
1215	    ])
1216	}
1217	
1218	const HELP_LINES_NET: &[&str] = &[
1219	    "h j k l / ←↓↑→  move cursor",
1220	    "Enter / Space   select / commit (sends Move to server)",
1221	    "Esc             cancel selection",
1222	    ":               coord input (instant): type ICCS (h2e2 / flip a0), Enter sends",
1223	    "m               coord input (live preview): same, with selected/cursor preview",
1224	    "f               flip (banqi)",
1225	    "n               request rematch (after game over; needs both sides)",
1226	    "t               open chat input (players only; Enter sends, Esc cancels)",
1227	    "r               toggle rules overlay",
1228	    "?               toggle this help",
1229	    "Click           select / commit",
1230	    "q / Ctrl-C      quit (closes the connection)",
1231	    "(undo not supported online yet)",
1232	];
1233	
1234	/// Map a Local game's outcome to the kind of big banner to draw. Local
1235	/// (hot-seat) play gets neutral "RED WINS / BLACK WINS / DRAW" copy
1236	/// because both seats share the same screen — calling either side
1237	/// "VICTORY" or "DEFEAT" would be misleading. Returns `None` while the
1238	/// game is still ongoing or for unsupported variants.
1239	fn endgame_kind_local(status: &GameStatus, _observer: Side) -> Option<BannerKind> {
1240	    match status {
1241	        GameStatus::Ongoing => None,
1242	        GameStatus::Won { winner, .. } => Some(BannerKind::Outcome(neutral_side_for(*winner))),
1243	        GameStatus::Drawn { .. } => Some(BannerKind::Draw),
1244	    }
1245	}
1246	
1247	/// Map a Net game's outcome. Players see VICTORY/DEFEAT keyed off their
1248	/// own seat; spectators always see the neutral RED WINS / BLACK WINS
1249	/// copy. Returns `None` while ongoing or before the role handshake.
1250	fn endgame_kind_net(status: &GameStatus, role: Option<NetRole>) -> Option<BannerKind> {
1251	    match (status, role) {
1252	        (GameStatus::Ongoing, _) => None,
1253	        (GameStatus::Drawn { .. }, _) => Some(BannerKind::Draw),
1254	        (GameStatus::Won { winner, .. }, Some(NetRole::Player(seat))) => {
1255	            if *winner == seat {
1256	                Some(BannerKind::Victory)
1257	            } else {
1258	                Some(BannerKind::Defeat)
1259	            }
1260	        }
1261	        (GameStatus::Won { winner, .. }, Some(NetRole::Spectator) | None) => {
1262	            Some(BannerKind::Outcome(neutral_side_for(*winner)))
1263	        }
1264	    }
1265	}
1266	
1267	fn neutral_side_for(side: Side) -> NeutralSide {
1268	    match side {
1269	        Side::RED => NeutralSide::Red,
1270	        Side::BLACK => NeutralSide::Black,
1271	        _ => NeutralSide::Green,
1272	    }
1273	}
1274	
1275	/// Render a confetti burst + centered ASCII banner over the board area
1276	/// during the post-game "look at this" window.
1277	///
1278	/// The trigger lives elsewhere (`AppState::note_status_transition`); this
1279	/// function only consumes the `confetti_pending` flag and the active
1280	/// `confetti_anim`. While an animation is alive we also render the
1281	/// matching big banner; once the animation expires both go away and the
1282	/// sidebar's existing `game_over_banner` is left as the persistent cue.
1283	///
1284	/// Skipped entirely when the user disabled FX (`--no-confetti`) — the
1285	/// pending flag is never armed in that case, so this function is a no-op.
1286	fn render_confetti_and_banner(
1287	    frame: &mut Frame,
1288	    board_area: Rect,
1289	    app: &mut AppState,
1290	    endgame_kind: Option<BannerKind>,
1291	    style: Style,
1292	    use_color: bool,
1293	) {
1294	    // Spawn a fresh burst if the trigger fired since the last frame. The
1295	    // sub-rect must be inside the board widget so particles land where the
1296	    // user is already looking.
1297	    if app.confetti_pending && app.confetti_anim.is_none() {
1298	        app.confetti_anim = Some(ConfettiAnim::spawn(board_area));
1299	        app.confetti_pending = false;
1300	    }
1301	
1302	    // Draw the big banner first (before particles overwrite cells), but
1303	    // only while the animation is alive so it auto-clears with the burst.
1304	    let anim_alive = app.confetti_anim.is_some();
1305	    if anim_alive {
1306	        if let Some(kind) = endgame_kind {
1307	            render_big_banner(frame, board_area, kind, style, use_color);
1308	        }
1309	    }
1310	
1311	    // Step + render particles. `step` advances physics and drops offscreen
1312	    // particles; `render` paints into the frame's buffer cells. When `done`,
1313	    // clear the slot so the next frame stops animating.
1314	    if let Some(anim) = app.confetti_anim.as_mut() {
1315	        let done = anim.step(board_area);
1316	        anim.render(frame.buffer_mut(), board_area, use_color);
1317	        if done {
1318	            app.confetti_anim = None;
1319	        }
1320	    }
1321	}
1322	
1323	/// Centre the ASCII art in `area`. If `area` is too narrow to fit the
1324	/// banner with reasonable padding, we silently skip the banner (confetti
1325	/// alone still plays). The kind's color is chosen for emotional read:
1326	/// yellow for VICTORY (excitement), red for DEFEAT (loss), magenta for
1327	/// DRAW (neutral but not muted), red for CHECK.
1328	fn render_big_banner(
1329	    frame: &mut Frame,
1330	    area: Rect,
1331	    kind: BannerKind,
1332	    style: Style,
1333	    use_color: bool,
1334	) {
1335	    let rows = banner::art(kind, style);
1336	    let banner_w = banner::max_width(rows) as u16;
1337	    let banner_h = rows.len() as u16;
1338	    if area.width < banner_w + 2 || area.height < banner_h + 2 {
1339	        return;
1340	    }
1341	    let x = area.x + (area.width.saturating_sub(banner_w)) / 2;
1342	    let y = area.y + (area.height.saturating_sub(banner_h)) / 2;
1343	    let sub = Rect { x, y, width: banner_w, height: banner_h };
1344	
1345	    let color = if !use_color {
1346	        Color::Reset
1347	    } else {
1348	        match kind {
1349	            BannerKind::Victory => Color::Yellow,
1350	            BannerKind::Defeat => Color::Red,
1351	            BannerKind::Draw => Color::Magenta,
1352	            BannerKind::Outcome(_) => Color::Yellow,
1353	            BannerKind::AppTitle => Color::Yellow,
1354	        }
1355	    };
1356	
1357	    let lines: Vec<Line> = rows
1358	        .iter()
1359	        .map(|r| {
1360	            Line::from(Span::styled(
1361	                r.to_string(),
1362	                TuiStyle::default().fg(color).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1363	            ))
1364	        })
1365	        .collect();
1366	
1367	    // Clear the cells under the banner so the board glyphs don't bleed
1368	    // through. The Clear widget wipes to default style, then Paragraph
1369	    // writes the banner text.
1370	    frame.render_widget(Clear, sub);
1371	    frame.render_widget(Paragraph::new(lines), sub);
1372	}
1373	
1374	fn game_over_banner(status: &GameStatus, style: Style) -> Option<Vec<Line<'static>>> {
1375	    match status {
1376	        GameStatus::Ongoing => None,
1377	        GameStatus::Won { winner, reason } => {
1378	            let header = Line::from(Span::styled(
1379	                "★  GAME OVER  ★",
1380	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1381	            ));
1382	            let winner_line = Line::from(vec![
1383	                Span::raw("Winner: "),
1384	                Span::styled(
1385	                    glyph::side_name(*winner, style),
1386	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(side_color(*winner)).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1387	                ),
1388	            ]);
1389	            let reason_line = Line::from(vec![
1390	                Span::raw("Reason: "),
1391	                Span::styled(
1392	                    win_reason_label(*reason),
1393	                    TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1394	                ),
1395	            ]);
1396	            let footer = Line::from(Span::styled(
1397	                "Press 'n' for new game, 'u' to take back, 'q' to quit.",
1398	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Cyan),
1399	            ));
1400	            Some(vec![header, winner_line, reason_line, footer])
1401	        }
1402	        GameStatus::Drawn { reason } => {
1403	            let header = Line::from(Span::styled(
1404	                "—  DRAW  —",
1405	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1406	            ));
1407	            let reason_line = Line::from(vec![
1408	                Span::raw("Reason: "),
1409	                Span::styled(
1410	                    format!("{:?}", reason),
1411	                    TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1412	                ),
1413	            ]);
1414	            let footer = Line::from(Span::styled(
1415	                "Press 'n' for new game, 'u' to take back, 'q' to quit.",
1416	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Cyan),
1417	            ));
1418	            Some(vec![header, reason_line, footer])
1419	        }
1420	    }
1421	}
1422	
1423	fn win_reason_label(reason: WinReason) -> &'static str {
1424	    match reason {
1425	        WinReason::Checkmate => "Checkmate (將死)",
1426	        WinReason::Stalemate => "Stalemate (困死) — no legal moves",
1427	        WinReason::Resignation => "Resignation",
1428	        WinReason::OnlyOneSideHasPieces => "Opponent eliminated",
1429	        WinReason::Timeout => "Time forfeit",
1430	        WinReason::GeneralCaptured => "General captured (將被吃)",
1431	    }
1432	}
1433	
1434	/// Compact, human-readable rendering of `GameStatus` for the sidebar's
1435	/// `Status:` line. Returns `(text, color)`. Engine `Debug` repr leaks
1436	/// `Side(0)` etc. and reads as noise to a player.
1437	fn format_status_short(status: GameStatus, style: Style) -> (String, Color) {
1438	    match status {
1439	        GameStatus::Ongoing => ("Ongoing".to_string(), Color::Gray),
1440	        GameStatus::Won { winner, reason } => (
1441	            format!("{} wins — {}", glyph::side_name(winner, style), win_reason_label(reason)),
1442	            side_color(winner),
1443	        ),
1444	        GameStatus::Drawn { reason } => (format!("Draw — {:?}", reason), Color::Gray),
1445	    }
1446	}
1447	
1448	fn line_label_value(label: &'static str, value: &str) -> Line<'static> {
1449	    Line::from(vec![
1450	        Span::styled(label, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)),
1451	        Span::raw(" "),
1452	        Span::raw(value.to_string()),
1453	    ])
1454	}
1455	
1456	fn draw_rules_overlay(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, _style: Style) {
1457	    // Center an overlay roughly 70 cols × 24 rows over the screen.
1458	    let pad_x = area.width.saturating_sub(72) / 2;
1459	    let pad_y = area.height.saturating_sub(26) / 2;
1460	    let overlay = Rect {
1461	        x: area.x + pad_x,
1462	        y: area.y + pad_y,
1463	        width: area.width.min(72),
1464	        height: area.height.min(26),
1465	    };
1466	    frame.render_widget(Clear, overlay);
1467	    let block =
1468	        Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Rules / 規則 — press r or Esc to close ");
1469	    let lines: Vec<Line> = RULES_LINES
1470	        .iter()
1471	        .map(|(s, accent)| {
1472	            let style = if *accent {
1473	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)
1474	            } else {
1475	                TuiStyle::default()
1476	            };
1477	            Line::from(Span::styled(*s, style))
1478	        })
1479	        .collect();
1480	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
1481	    frame.render_widget(para, overlay);
1482	}
1483	
1484	fn draw_quit_confirm_overlay(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect) {
1485	    // Small modal centered over the screen.
1486	    let w = 48u16;
1487	    let h = 7u16;
1488	    let pad_x = area.width.saturating_sub(w) / 2;
1489	    let pad_y = area.height.saturating_sub(h) / 2;
1490	    let overlay = Rect {
1491	        x: area.x + pad_x,
1492	        y: area.y + pad_y,
1493	        width: area.width.min(w),
1494	        height: area.height.min(h),
1495	    };
1496	    frame.render_widget(Clear, overlay);
1497	    let block = Block::default()
1498	        .borders(Borders::ALL)
1499	        .title(" Quit? ")
1500	        .border_style(TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow));
1501	    let lines = vec![
1502	        Line::from(""),
1503	        Line::from(Span::styled(
1504	            "  End the in-progress game?",
1505	            TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1506	        )),
1507	        Line::from(Span::styled(
1508	            "  Press y to quit, anything else to keep playing.",
1509	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Gray),
1510	        )),
1511	    ];
1512	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
1513	    frame.render_widget(para, overlay);
1514	}
1515	
1516	const HELP_LINES: &[&str] = &[
1517	    "h j k l / ←↓↑→  move cursor",
1518	    "Enter / Space   select / commit",
1519	    "Esc             cancel selection",
1520	    ":               coord input (instant): type ICCS (h2e2 / flip a0), Enter commits",
1521	    "m               coord input (live preview): same, with selected/cursor preview",
1522	    "u               undo last move",
1523	    "f               flip (banqi)",
1524	    "n               new game (back to picker)",
1525	    "r               toggle rules overlay",
1526	    "?               toggle this help",
1527	    "Click           select / commit",
1528	    "q / Ctrl-C      quit",
1529	];
1530	
1531	const RULES_LINES: &[(&str, bool)] = &[
1532	    ("Xiangqi 象棋", true),
1533	    ("", false),
1534	    ("• Red (帥仕相俥傌炮兵) moves first; Black (將士象車馬砲卒) replies.", false),
1535	    ("• General/Advisor stay inside the 3×3 palace (files d–f).", false),
1536	    ("• Elephants stay on their own side of the river (ranks 0–4 / 5–9).", false),
1537	    ("• Horses are blocked by 馬腿 — the orthogonal step in the move's direction.", false),
1538	    ("• Cannon non-capturing slide is like a chariot; capture requires jumping", false),
1539	    ("  exactly one piece (the screen 砲架) in a straight line.", false),
1540	    ("• Soldiers move forward one square; after crossing the river they can also", false),
1541	    ("  move sideways (but never backward).", false),
1542	    ("• Generals cannot face each other on a clear file (飛將 rule).", false),
1543	    ("• Standard: any move that leaves your general capturable is illegal.", false),
1544	    ("  Casual mode (--allow-self-check / picker entry) lifts that filter;", false),
1545	    ("  the game ends when the general is physically captured.", false),
1546	    ("", false),
1547	    ("Banqi 暗棋", true),
1548	    ("", false),
1549	    ("• 4×8 half-board, 32 pieces face-down. Pick a hidden piece to flip;", false),
1550	    ("  the FIRST flip locks the colors (flipper plays the revealed color).", false),
1551	    ("• Capture by piece rank: General > Advisor > Elephant > Chariot >", false),
1552	    ("  Horse > Cannon > Soldier. Soldier captures General (民推翻王).", false),
1553	    ("• Cannon captures by jumping over exactly one piece (any rank).", false),
1554	    ("• House rules (toggleable presets): chain-capture (連吃), chariot-rush", false),
1555	    ("  (車衝). Other house rules are P1 TODO.", false),
1556	    ("", false),
```

 `./clients/chess-tui/src/glyph.rs`

```text
1	//! Piece glyph tables. Two render styles: traditional CJK (帥/將 etc.) and
2	//! ASCII single-letter (uppercase = Red, lowercase = Black). The engine has
3	//! no concept of glyphs — presentation lives entirely in the client.
4	
5	use chess_core::piece::{PieceKind, Side};
6	
7	#[derive(Copy, Clone, Eq, PartialEq, Debug)]
8	pub enum Style {
9	    Cjk,
10	    Ascii,
11	}
12	
13	/// Two-column-wide string for a piece. CJK characters are double-width in a
14	/// monospace terminal; ASCII glyphs are padded with a trailing space so cells
15	/// align in either mode.
16	pub fn glyph(kind: PieceKind, side: Side, style: Style) -> &'static str {
17	    match style {
18	        Style::Cjk => cjk(kind, side),
19	        Style::Ascii => ascii(kind, side),
20	    }
21	}
22	
23	fn cjk(kind: PieceKind, side: Side) -> &'static str {
24	    match (side, kind) {
25	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::General) => "帥",
26	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Advisor) => "仕",
27	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Elephant) => "相",
28	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Chariot) => "俥",
29	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Horse) => "傌",
30	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Cannon) => "炮",
31	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Soldier) => "兵",
32	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::General) => "將",
33	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Advisor) => "士",
34	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Elephant) => "象",
35	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Chariot) => "車",
36	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Horse) => "馬",
37	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Cannon) => "砲",
38	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Soldier) => "卒",
39	        // 三國暗棋 — Green seat. Reuse Black glyphs for now; PR-2 may pick a
40	        // distinct glyph set (e.g. 君/臣/...) once the variant ships.
41	        (_, PieceKind::General) => "將",
42	        (_, PieceKind::Advisor) => "士",
43	        (_, PieceKind::Elephant) => "象",
44	        (_, PieceKind::Chariot) => "車",
45	        (_, PieceKind::Horse) => "馬",
46	        (_, PieceKind::Cannon) => "砲",
47	        (_, PieceKind::Soldier) => "卒",
48	    }
49	}
50	
51	fn ascii(kind: PieceKind, side: Side) -> &'static str {
52	    match (side, kind) {
53	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::General) => "K ",
54	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Advisor) => "A ",
55	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Elephant) => "B ",
56	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Chariot) => "R ",
57	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Horse) => "N ",
58	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Cannon) => "C ",
59	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Soldier) => "P ",
60	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::General) => "k ",
61	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Advisor) => "a ",
62	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Elephant) => "b ",
63	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Chariot) => "r ",
64	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Horse) => "n ",
65	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Cannon) => "c ",
66	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Soldier) => "p ",
67	        (_, PieceKind::General) => "K*",
68	        (_, PieceKind::Advisor) => "A*",
69	        (_, PieceKind::Elephant) => "B*",
70	        (_, PieceKind::Chariot) => "R*",
71	        (_, PieceKind::Horse) => "N*",
72	        (_, PieceKind::Cannon) => "C*",
73	        (_, PieceKind::Soldier) => "P*",
74	    }
75	}
76	
77	/// Hidden / face-down piece (banqi pre-flip).
78	pub fn hidden(style: Style) -> &'static str {
79	    match style {
80	        Style::Cjk => "暗",
81	        Style::Ascii => "? ",
82	    }
83	}
84	
85	/// Human-readable side label for the sidebar. `Side(0)` (engine debug) is
86	/// useless to a player; this returns "Red (紅)" / "Black (黑)" / "Green (綠)"
87	/// in CJK style and "Red" / "Black" / "Green" in ASCII style.
88	pub fn side_name(side: Side, style: Style) -> &'static str {
89	    match (side, style) {
90	        (Side::RED, Style::Cjk) => "Red 紅",
91	        (Side::BLACK, Style::Cjk) => "Black 黑",
92	        (Side::RED, Style::Ascii) => "Red",
93	        (Side::BLACK, Style::Ascii) => "Black",
94	        (_, Style::Cjk) => "Green 綠",
95	        (_, Style::Ascii) => "Green",
96	    }
97	}
98	
99	#[cfg(test)]
100	mod tests {
101	    use super::*;
102	
103	    #[test]
104	    fn glyph_table_total_for_red_and_black() {
105	        for kind in PieceKind::ALL {
106	            for side in [Side::RED, Side::BLACK] {
107	                let cjk_g = glyph(kind, side, Style::Cjk);
108	                let ascii_g = glyph(kind, side, Style::Ascii);
109	                assert!(!cjk_g.is_empty(), "missing CJK glyph for {:?}/{:?}", side, kind);
110	                assert_eq!(ascii_g.chars().count(), 2, "ASCII glyph not 2 cols: {:?}", ascii_g);
111	            }
112	        }
113	    }
114	
115	    #[test]
116	    fn red_and_black_distinct_in_cjk() {
117	        for kind in PieceKind::ALL {
118	            assert_ne!(
119	                glyph(kind, Side::RED, Style::Cjk),
120	                glyph(kind, Side::BLACK, Style::Cjk),
121	                "Red and Black share a CJK glyph for {:?}",
122	                kind
123	            );
124	        }
125	    }
126	
127	    #[test]
128	    fn hidden_renders() {
129	        assert_eq!(hidden(Style::Ascii), "? ");
130	        assert!(!hidden(Style::Cjk).is_empty());
131	    }
132	}
133
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	//! Piece glyph tables. Two render styles: traditional CJK (帥/將 etc.) and
2	//! ASCII single-letter (uppercase = Red, lowercase = Black). The engine has
3	//! no concept of glyphs — presentation lives entirely in the client.
4	//!
5	//! Verbatim copy of `clients/chess-tui/src/glyph.rs` (see orient.rs note).
6	
7	use chess_core::piece::{PieceKind, Side};
8	
9	#[derive(Copy, Clone, Eq, PartialEq, Debug)]
10	pub enum Style {
11	    Cjk,
12	    Ascii,
13	}
14	
15	pub fn glyph(kind: PieceKind, side: Side, style: Style) -> &'static str {
16	    match style {
17	        Style::Cjk => cjk(kind, side),
18	        Style::Ascii => ascii(kind, side),
19	    }
20	}
21	
22	fn cjk(kind: PieceKind, side: Side) -> &'static str {
23	    match (side, kind) {
24	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::General) => "帥",
25	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Advisor) => "仕",
26	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Elephant) => "相",
27	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Chariot) => "俥",
28	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Horse) => "傌",
29	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Cannon) => "炮",
30	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Soldier) => "兵",
31	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::General) => "將",
32	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Advisor) => "士",
33	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Elephant) => "象",
34	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Chariot) => "車",
35	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Horse) => "馬",
36	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Cannon) => "砲",
37	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Soldier) => "卒",
38	        (_, PieceKind::General) => "將",
39	        (_, PieceKind::Advisor) => "士",
40	        (_, PieceKind::Elephant) => "象",
41	        (_, PieceKind::Chariot) => "車",
42	        (_, PieceKind::Horse) => "馬",
43	        (_, PieceKind::Cannon) => "砲",
44	        (_, PieceKind::Soldier) => "卒",
45	    }
46	}
47	
48	fn ascii(kind: PieceKind, side: Side) -> &'static str {
49	    match (side, kind) {
50	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::General) => "K",
51	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Advisor) => "A",
52	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Elephant) => "B",
53	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Chariot) => "R",
54	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Horse) => "N",
55	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Cannon) => "C",
56	        (Side::RED, PieceKind::Soldier) => "P",
57	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::General) => "k",
58	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Advisor) => "a",
59	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Elephant) => "b",
60	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Chariot) => "r",
61	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Horse) => "n",
62	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Cannon) => "c",
63	        (Side::BLACK, PieceKind::Soldier) => "p",
64	        (_, PieceKind::General) => "K*",
65	        (_, PieceKind::Advisor) => "A*",
66	        (_, PieceKind::Elephant) => "B*",
67	        (_, PieceKind::Chariot) => "R*",
68	        (_, PieceKind::Horse) => "N*",
69	        (_, PieceKind::Cannon) => "C*",
70	        (_, PieceKind::Soldier) => "P*",
71	    }
72	}
73	
74	/// Hidden / face-down piece (banqi pre-flip).
75	pub fn hidden(style: Style) -> &'static str {
76	    match style {
77	        Style::Cjk => "暗",
78	        Style::Ascii => "?",
79	    }
80	}
81	
82	/// Human-readable side label.
83	pub fn side_name(side: Side, style: Style) -> &'static str {
84	    match (side, style) {
85	        (Side::RED, Style::Cjk) => "Red 紅",
86	        (Side::BLACK, Style::Cjk) => "Black 黑",
87	        (Side::RED, Style::Ascii) => "Red",
88	        (Side::BLACK, Style::Ascii) => "Black",
89	        (_, Style::Cjk) => "Green 綠",
90	        (_, Style::Ascii) => "Green",
91	    }
92	}
93	
94	#[cfg(test)]
95	mod tests {
96	    use super::*;
97	
98	    #[test]
99	    fn glyph_table_total_for_red_and_black() {
100	        for kind in PieceKind::ALL {
101	            for side in [Side::RED, Side::BLACK] {
102	                assert!(!glyph(kind, side, Style::Cjk).is_empty());
103	                assert!(!glyph(kind, side, Style::Ascii).is_empty());
104	            }
105	        }
106	    }
107	
108	    #[test]
109	    fn red_and_black_distinct_in_cjk() {
110	        for kind in PieceKind::ALL {
111	            assert_ne!(
112	                glyph(kind, Side::RED, Style::Cjk),
113	                glyph(kind, Side::BLACK, Style::Cjk),
114	                "Red and Black share a CJK glyph for {:?}",
115	                kind
116	            );
117	        }
118	    }
119	
120	    #[test]
121	    fn hidden_renders() {
122	        assert_eq!(hidden(Style::Ascii), "?");
123	        assert!(!hidden(Style::Cjk).is_empty());
124	    }
125	}
126
```
